parameters.content:
## 🎬 360° Product Video Generator

Turn a single product photo into a cinematic 360° video using Google Veo 3 — delivered straight to Telegram.

## How it works
1. User sends a product photo to your Telegram bot
2. The workflow authenticates with Google Cloud using a Service Account stored in Google Sheets
3. The image is sent to Vertex AI (Veo 3) with a 360° orbit camera prompt
4. The workflow polls every 2 minutes until the video is ready (up to 10 min)
5. The finished video is sent back to the user in Telegram

## Setup steps
1. Create a Telegram bot via @BotFather and add the credentials in n8n
2. Enable the **Vertex AI API** in your Google Cloud project and request Veo 3 preview access
3. Create a Service Account with `roles/aiplatform.user` and download the JSON key
4. Paste the key fields into your Google Sheet — columns needed: `client_email`, `private_key`, `project_id`, `scope`
5. Update the **1. Get Service Account Details** node with your Sheet ID
6. Connect your Google and Telegram credentials, then activate the workflow

## Receive & Validate
Listens for Telegram messages and checks that a photo was sent and is at least 480px. Rejects documents or text-only messages and replies with a clear error.

## Google Cloud Auth
Reads Service Account credentials from Google Sheets, signs a JWT locally, and exchanges it for a short-lived OAuth access token. Runs fresh on every request.

## Download & Convert
Downloads the highest-resolution version of the photo from Telegram and converts it to Base64. Any conversion failure is caught and reported back to the user.

## Submit to Veo 3
Builds the API payload with a cinematic 360° orbit prompt and submits a long-running job to Vertex AI Veo 3. Gets back an operation ID used for polling.

## Poll for Result
Checks every 2 minutes whether the video is ready. Times out after 40 attempts (~10 min) and notifies the user with a friendly error if generation takes too long.

## Deliver Video
Converts the Base64 video bytes to a file and sends it directly to the user in Telegram.

parameters.text:

Please try again with a different image or contact support.

🎬 Creating your 360° product video...

⏱️ This takes around 3–4 minutes

Please try sending the photo again.
